# UC-12.3.15 · Ansible Task Retry Exhaustion and Max Failures

## Description

Exhausted retries extend change windows and may leave partial configuration.

## Value

Highlights tasks that burn through retries so owners fix flakiness or ordering.

## Implementation

Filter to production playbooks; sample in lower environments. Use `task` field from callback JSON.

## SPL

```spl
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:callback" OR sourcetype="awx:job_events"
| search "retries" AND ("failed" OR "Giving up" OR "Final result: FAILED")
| stats count by playbook, host, task
| where count>=5
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (task × host), Line chart (retry events).

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
- [Splunk HEC — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)
